do: Always pair with a visible <label> or aria-label.
Use the indeterminate prop for mixed parent states (sets the DOM property, announced as "mixed").
dont: Don't use Checkbox for instant on/off settings — use switch.
Don't use a group of checkboxes for a single-choice — use radio-group.

boundaries: error is a bool prop; disabled is the only state prop — checked/hover looks are CSS.

whenToUseInstead.when: an instant setting with no submit step
exactly one option can be chosen
the checkbox needs an inline label/description card
